name: DS Agent Built-in Office Control
description: Built-in DS Agent skills for creating Word, Excel, and PowerPoint artifacts and for safely routing app UI control through Computer Use when needed.

actions.description: Create a local .docx, .xlsx, or .pptx artifact in the configured DS Agent workspace.
Update an existing workspace .docx, .xlsx, or .pptx file by appending Word paragraphs, Excel rows, or PowerPoint slides.
Open a workspace .docx, .xlsx, or .pptx file with the matching Microsoft Office app when available, falling back to the system default app.
Inspect the visible desktop before screen-dependent Office UI control.
Execute one approved structured Office UI input action at a time.
